title: LumenLedger Deployment Configuration
content:
Title: LumenLedger Deployment Configuration

The LumenLedger deployment profile is maintained by the Security team and is used by release engineers during production rollouts.

- Default Replica Count: 3
- Cluster Region: eu-west-1
- Auto-scaling Threshold: 85% CPU
- Rollback Window: 5 minutes
- Cluster Name: nt-prod-cluster-7

If the auto-scaling threshold is exceeded, the system expands replica capacity automatically. Failed deployments are eligible for rollback within the rollback window.
